arts.ttl: Barcelona’s predicted XI to face Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: An insight into the personnel plans of Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick for the club’s upcoming showdown with Borussia Dortmund has on Wednesday been provided. The info comes courtesy of…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'cool interest' in 101-goal striker amid concerns over his 'style of play'
arts.sum: Barcelona allegedly cool their interest in Lille striker Jonathan David due to concerns over his style of play.

arts.ttl: Barca boss Flick handed two-match ban for Betis red card
arts.sum: It’s now been confirmed that he’s been banned for two games, meaning he will not be on the touchline for La Liga matches against Leganes and Atletico Madrid. The German was shown a straight red card for his reaction to a penalty being awarded against his side for a challenge by Frenkie de Jong on Vitor Roque.

arts.ttl: Barça coach Flick given two-game touchline ban
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick has been handed a two-game touchline ban following his red card in Saturday's 2-2 draw against Real Betis in LaLiga.

Dani Olmo can leave club for free in January without registration in three weeks - Football España With the hamstring injury that needed surgery now behind him, the Uruguayan defender has been included in the Barça squad for the game against Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Barcelona leave Nico Williams to Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal have received a massive boost to their hopes of signing Nico Williams after Barcelona ’s interest in the Euro 2024 star subsided. Arsenal journalist Charles Watts says that Arteta wants to sign an attacker during the January transfer window as he feels the Gunners are lightgweight in this area.

arts.ttl: Barcelona revelations made: no training, Ronaldinho vs Messi...
arts.sum: That year, Ronaldinho, Quaresma, and Márquez signed too, plus players like Xavi, Iniesta, Luis Enrique, Cocu, and Kluivert were already there. In Barcelona, training was all about the ball – 45 minutes of rondos, a couple of runs.

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski: The Borussia Dortmund years
arts.sum: Although a 2009/10 Polish league winner and 18-goal top scorer with Poznan, Lewandowski played more of a bit-part role in Dortmund's triumphant 2010/11 Bundesliga campaign under Jürgen Klopp . Lewandowski spent eight seasons in Bavaria, winning a Bundesliga title every year and becoming the second highest scorer in the league and Bayern’s history, only behind Gerd Müller - whose single season record of 40 goals he did eclipse.

arts.ttl: Guirassy responds to reported Bayern interest
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy has spoken out about reports that Bayern Munich were interested in signing him last summer.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
